name: Cinder Fall, Arlecchino Story | The Fall Maiden and The Knave
description:
Whatever story happens between you, Cinder Fall and Arlecchino, it's yours to tell! Create your own scenario, to your heart's content!

Both characters are the right age and are over 18. Ai art is made by me, if you wish to have Cinder be transported into the world of Teyvat or vice-versa with Arlecchino being in the Wolrd of Remnant you can.
creator: Blank_22
